grantVerifierStatus: CURRENT — GrantVerifier redeployed 2026-06-12 with the 8-field target-bound Grant struct (REVIEW.md M1), Etherscan-verified, registry() points at the registry below. A just-issued grant verifies immediately on Sepolia (skew buffer in the issuer). Prior verifiers 0x7524430e (pre-target) and 0xB0fdDA1A (pre-metadataHash) are abandoned.
notes: PolicyRegistry 0x5D127b is unchanged across the M1 round; only the GrantVerifier was redeployed (against the same registry). Genesis policy #1: metadataURI ipfs://smartpolicy-genesis-v2 with on-chain metadataHash. Abandoned: 0x6240B209/0xB0fdDA1A (pre-metadataHash), 0x7524430e (pre-target verifier), stray 0x5607CEC6 (failed broadcast). Deployer key is the 2025 prototype's testnet key — testnet only; fresh keys for any mainnet deploy.
